headline: Saylor to Musk: Thanks to you, 25% of 'Mag8' firms now hold bitcoin
snippet: "Thanks to you, 25% of the Mag8 now holds bitcoin on the balance sheet," Saylor wrote on X, congratulating Musk on SpaceX's historic IPO debut.

headline: SEC's big swing to clear tokenization path isn't likely to get resilience of full rule
snippet: Former SEC lawyers say that using its power to grant tokenization "innovation" efforts an exemption from securities law isn't as strong as a full-fledged rule.

headline: Aerodrome is turning liquidity into a prediction market with its biggest upgrade yet
snippet: The concept, called Predictive Allocation, will encourage participants to anticipate where liquidity will be needed next, instead of rewarding them for directing incentives toward pools that have already generated fees.

headline: Summer of crypto (regs): State of Crypto
snippet: Lawmakers are debating taxes, the CFTC put out a prediction market proposal and court cases are heating up.

headline: Bitcoin could crash to $48,000, if this historical pattern is triggered
snippet: A pattern stretching back to bitcoin's earliest days has held through every market cycle. It has yet to be tested in the current one.

headline: Wall Street and crypto are crashing into each other as tokenized treasury markets hit $14.6 billion
snippet: Not all crypto exchange executives agree, but the data does not lie: centralized exchange trading volumes dropped more than 11% to $4.61 trillion, their lowest since late 2024.
